item.title: The $1,000 Car Buying Mistake People Keep Making
item.description: A look at a common car buying mistake that can cost people $1,000. What should buyers watch for before making a deal?

media:content.media:title: The $1,000 Car Buying Mistake People Keep Making
media:content.media:description: A look at a common car buying mistake that can cost people $1,000. What should buyers watch for before making a deal?

item.title: Trade-In Appraisals: One Detail Can Change the Value
item.description: One overlooked detail can swing the whole appraisal. Learn how trade-in pricing can change and what to watch for during the appraisal process. What detail do you check first?

media:content.media:title: Trade-In Appraisals: One Detail Can Change the Value
media:content.media:description: One overlooked detail can swing the whole appraisal. Learn how trade-in pricing can change and what to watch for during the appraisal process. What detail do you check first?

item.title: How a Trade-In Move Can Cost You More
item.description: One small move can turn your trade-in into easy money for the dealer. This video looks at trade-in pricing, hidden fees, and how dealers can structure deals. What should buyers watch for before trading in?

media:content.media:title: How a Trade-In Move Can Cost You More
media:content.media:description: One small move can turn your trade-in into easy money for the dealer. This video looks at trade-in pricing, hidden fees, and how dealers can structure deals. What should buyers watch for before trading in?

item.title: What to Watch Before Signing at a Chevy Dealer
item.description: A closer look at where car buyers can get burned before signing paperwork, with a focus on dealer fees and the buying process. What should shoppers check first?

item.title: Used Car Prices: What the Numbers Show
item.description: A look at used car pricing and what the numbers actually show, with practical insight for buyers and shoppers. How much of the market talk matches reality?

item.title: A quick used-car check can help avoid mistakes
item.description: One quick look like this can help you avoid a bad used-car mistake. What should buyers check first before making an offer?

item.title: Paperwork Changes the Car Buying Story
item.description: A stack of documents can change how a dealership story is understood. This video looks at the role paperwork can play in car buying and sales. What does the paperwork actually show?

media:content.media:title: Paperwork Changes the Car Buying Story

item.title: The line item buyers should not skip
item.description: A closer look at the line item buyers often overlook when moving too fast. In car buying, slowing down can help you spot issues before they become costly. What details do you check first?

item.title: What to Know Before You Sign at a Dealership
item.description: A look at what he reveals before you sign anything, with a focus on car buying, dealership details, and financing. What should buyers check before finalizing a deal?

item.title: What Set It Off and How It Was Handled
item.description: A car dealership story about what triggered the situation and how it was handled. What happened, and what can buyers and dealers learn from it?

item.title: The Used Car Crash Is a Lie
item.description: A data-driven look at the used car market challenges popular claims about a major price collapse, separating headlines from reality. What do the numbers actually reveal about vehicle values?

media:content.media:title: The Used Car Crash Is a Lie
media:content.media:description: A data-driven look at the used car market challenges popular claims about a major price collapse, separating headlines from reality. What do the numbers actually reveal about vehicle values?
